item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses opening a new gift handling point, identifies the prior pattern of repeated queues/windows for returns, points, and preorder pickup, moves upstream to intake/routing/capacity/ownership diagnosis, and proposes consolidating into unified upstream triage rather than another local split."}
